message.content:
@startuml skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center autonumber "[0]" actor "Webブラウザ" as WebBrowser1 at 25% participant "CCM GUI\n(Web)" as CCMGUI_Web at 43.75% participant "CCM GUI\n(WebSocket)" as CCMGUI_WS at 68.75% box "" #LightBlue participant "CCM SDK\n(IPC)" as CCMSDK_IPC end box == activate CCMSDK_IPC note right of CCMSDK_IPC : ネットワーク情報変更通知 受信
(RegistRecieveNetworkInfoHandler) deactivate CCMSDK_IPC ' Notify message from IPC to WebSocket component dotted leftward arrow over CCMSDK_IPC,CCMGUISocket:ネットワーク情報変更通知 [notify] create note "{\"command\": \"NetworkInfo\",\n\"type\": \"notify\",\n\"data\": {\n \"ID\": \"xxx\", \n \"CellularInfo\": [{\n \"SignalStrength\": \"...\",\n \"SignalStrengthUnit\": \"...\",\n \"Operator\":\"...\",\n \"PLMN\":\"...\",\n \"Band\":\"...\",\n \"CellID\":\"...\",\n \"AirInterface\":\"...\",\n \"Manufacture\":\"...\",\n \"ModelName\":\"...\",\n \"IMEI\":\"...\"\n }],\n \"QosInterfaceType\":{\"key1\":\"val1,\n ...\n }\n }}"as jsonNote float top 9px jsonNote -[hidden]-down:CcmGuiSocket group Display data on screen every second dotted downarrow over webbrowser,Ccmguiweb:1秒間隔で保持データを画面に表示 end group @enduml
